retrieved_result: What is absolute location? Lindalee Stuckey 293,815 Contributions Weeds are the bane of my existence! I have a Star Trek garden with 21 Star Trek named daylilies and many plants to attract butterflies. What is absolute location? Absolute Location is the specific location of a place with latitudeand longitude. Charm9899 4 Cont
